name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Kemp + voter suppression [headline]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Kemp knows he will lose if all of us vote! |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa76b/34a064cc/1f90a84/70d52f0/4122697136/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - This headline should make you angry: [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa76b/34a064cc/1f90a84/70d52f1/4122697136/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI0MjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10242018-full") Brian Kemp - _the guy in charge of our elections_! - is worried that too many Georgians are voting. That's not just backwards. It's extremely dangerous. We all know Kemp has a history of voter suppression. You only need to look back a few weeks to when his office put a hold on processing _53,000 voter registrations_. Now we know why he is so desperate to keep Georgians from the polls: **Kemp knows he will lose if all of us vote!** But our team isn't going to let a SINGLE eligible voter sit this election out. We're going to win this election for Stacey Abrams and for every Georgia family counting on OUR TEAM to make this happen. But we need your help to get out every vote in these final 13 days: **[Make a $3 donation to Stacey Abrams' campaign right away. This race is going to be decided by just a handful of votes, so you know every time we contact a voter is an opportunity to change the course of our state for decades to come.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa76b/34a064cc/1f90a84/70d52f1/4122697136/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI0MjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10242018-full")** Brian Kemp may want people to stay home this election, but we're not going to let him win that way. We're leaving it all on the line. Let's do this. Sincerely yours, \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa76b/34a064cc/1f90a84/70d52f1/4122697136/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI0MjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10242018-full")**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I'm supporting I-940
disclaimer_text: Paid for by De-Escalate Washington I-940
body:
I-940 will save lives and help make our communities safer.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b4d0/2f5ea88d/747dd2ab/2cbd956b/1157502858/VEsH/ "https://www.deescalatewa.org/donate") Friend, **I'm supporting De-Escalate Washington Initiative 940 on this year's ballot, and I'm asking you to do the same.** Across our state, people believe police should use deadly force _only_ **as a last resort.** And we know training works. That's why law enforcement should be trained in de-escalation so **our police have the skills to keep themselves and the public safe.** **Friend, I-940 is a commonsense measure that will save lives.** It makes changes to our laws that will keep our law enforcement and our communities safe. That's why I'm supporting it, and I hope you will as well. [**Can you make a contribution to the I-940 campaign to help it pass in November?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b4d0/2f5ea88d/747dd2ab/2cbd956b/1157502858/VEsE/ "https://www.deescalatewa.org/donate") Sadly, Washington state has not been immune from the tragedy of lives lost unnecessarily. Like many states, we have suffered needless law enforcement-involved shootings in our communities. This initiative requires the needed training for law enforcement on de-escalation and mental health, and creates a duty for police to render first aid at the earliest opportunity. But I'm proud that, **once again, our state is on the forefront of change.** With I-940, we will show the rest of the nation that through transparency, trust, training, and accountability, we will come together to save lives. [**We need your help today to pass I-940 in November. It's central to saving lives and making our communities safer. I hope I can count on you to help.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b4d0/2f5ea88d/747dd2ab/2cbd956b/1157502858/VEsF/ "https://www.deescalatewa.org/donate") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b4d0/2f5ea88d/747dd2ab/2cbd956b/1157502858/VEsC/ "https://www.deescalatewa.org/donate")
---

name: Leah
subject: fired up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Wow. What a day. As soon as President Trump touched down, I could feel the energy of not only our President, but the thousands of Wisconsinites in....
****

Friend,

Wow. What a day. As soon as President Trump touched down, I could feel the energy of not only our President, but the thousands of Wisconsinites in attendance ready to beat Senator Baldwin.

After the MAGA rally, I had a chance to talk with the President and share the many notes you all left for him. I shared your concerns with Baldwin’s ridiculous plan to replace health care as we know it with an expensive, government-run system. I shared your messages of thanks for slashing taxes across the country and increasing the dollars in our pockets.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e128c708bee54950b2fa4f812bc055bc&_e=zhHQpXNDWtWGqV8JbLSnKBT3CNslMHoUPI7HvoKG0vFCg0NNE_Byalr2TF65QmFAZCQRadbT87I9LXqhOpD13z31svrxummx2rm9rjggWNeFOxaGwxFW9tKV5sgueDdljBdl-TQp3jx9uMec79Hroxe9lTRVpr6CcGG1w6AK1rzK0xaKoAtujah4-6tDAiUdisGwNxbD5sMRqbDtUQCD08Wo8kbnvg910fy-nL4y0ctkAO-qk2JNINpOroxIT6uYu88sdDTdpX0uNEsCQ8jzxEQZ6BQUsz-_Ft1-MyNZhXZuFDs33Gll4RQkUTm44qZkVd5rrmG_HdgiovIHJSkaE7nxI76YQcMz_AE9rqk-BZlel61yGxkwMAP5B3ED3Ed60OTiRc7wV4OZdOnHk1dyYBAxnac-5j1T6WcRP1STzd8%3D)

That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e128c708bee54950b2fa4f812bc055bc&_e=zhHQpXNDWtWGqV8JbLSnKK1ZCs6Ppfz-HiEvdNxhBGjujRdILlIZ6Rz2rNgCRWmpnDS8IUhDYNv7sWdm3mUceO-Z41-V767U5KYg_c3egdiJBm-6ubtXbe32LvML8Bu0hO3Dzkn0vTJ7wrdmymr3aBrNp-tMERTWBNaxYvq4bYKtl5xQdDLKIY8DLeEFQQgTXnlLl9BL4yP5pHWkNu4jx5bL_4xj_UurHr5mvByYMrlFYbb1NnzHDI0LKbDi4beSbi1hlK4mbmMJXxZAZtN_lsuJnWIjREuIgfhoiilEDs6OCB0IlF5uKM36djB9m-efMEg-tBRnrGDYFdYarhsVRCk9bsdI3Qe2QIgc9SIn8h7lxUEV7-bbrqMqudxEMgJ_) that you care about? So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e128c708bee54950b2fa4f812bc055bc&_e=zhHQpXNDWtWGqV8JbLSnKK1ZCs6Ppfz-HiEvdNxhBGh-R6Nsg0WyH5CFr0WwfzYcJPnNMHtavcKKkJWyEMI7t7PSO4lndnF15y0RZx4dKtff1bIwDvPU08909LquKYVAUJLZc_Ibct6QCByG1atCNRegSHlVenYLBs9jp3dR-8RVVWUWpRxYw4aXPpm4gJVPqoScJVtQuh0LBk6C7MKBhz9H1_BT2RwADZ42HKxbO0mAJWjPSBwb9VbbcWJCmrqP-n_JmkCYIHMRcKMvgzR8l7Dfz_d0197jNGjOx4T1oip_XUjV5eV8ls7iNqUrSMJGBsbvWFn8TQy9VfJV70pGt-MxLlFyXamWkXlSkLw3EJF8ZsYhFl43WXc8ADUb52Hw) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e128c708bee54950b2fa4f812bc055bc&_e=1huaD-Bv54i-nasXhvyM2xtDoybEcVSqYhWKpdTX7gLSlR6op8SI1TGjaY8-i9kVkEkX61EunkIYj8g-nkPL91Tg1d_okS-1wZ3HFm8Exq8YY3u14EBsG4KqDsUSid7lBPQsIAWQErRhy3M23x6NTjNrkTsj9PjbOHCPT2EdnZjet0mI93NkBNM6Dn4kdWiSf1o9njU1ZjTu-FFyZpM-_NUbXrzPq8I9c00Bn-3eio4Bp_OUkAnbpGIB0XKlcvdC) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e128c708bee54950b2fa4f812bc055bc&_e=1huaD-Bv54i-nasXhvyM2xtDoybEcVSqYhWKpdTX7gLSlR6op8SI1TGjaY8-i9kVkEkX61EunkIYj8g-nkPL91Tg1d_okS-1wZ3HFm8Exq8YY3u14EBsG4KqDsUSid7lBPQsIAWQErRhy3M23x6NTjNrkTsj9PjbOHCPT2EdnZjet0mI93NkBNM6Dn4kdWiSf1o9njU1ZjTu-FFyZpM-_NUbXrzPq8I9c00Bn-3eio4Bp_OUkAnbpGIB0XKlcvdC) to unsubscribe. What we need is someone dedicated to boosting up Wisconsin’s middle class. Someone who has a record of fighting for conservative causes and never giving up. President Trump needs you. He is getting the job done for Americans, but the Democrats are hell-bent on wiping out everything on his agenda with their so-called “blue wave.” We need to show President Trump that we are with him 100% and STOP Tammy Baldwin in her tracks. She sides with the liberal mob, resisting everything the President does. From erasing our tax cuts to taking away our Second Amendment rights, Baldwin stands with those whose only goal is to obstruct and resist the president. They must be stopped. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Two Weeks Out – So How’s the Election Looking?
body:
Two Weeks Out - So How's the Election Looking? No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-s/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-y/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-j/)
### [Two Weeks Out - So How's the Election Looking?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-t/)
A lot better than it looked two months ago, or two weeks ago for that matter. I think things are trending in the right direction. The Democrats' advantage on the generic ballot has narrowed significantly - from double digits to low single digits. And in the so-called battleground congressional districts, the ones that are hotly contested this time around (like mine), and will decide which party controls the House after the election, the generic ballot is essentially a dead heat. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-i/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-d/)
### [Trump, Robert E. Lee, Some Nut Hates Republicans, and Our First Debate Last Night](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-h/)
As I'm sure you know, President Trump came to town last Friday. And since I kind of had a ring side seat as the whole thing unfolded, I thought I'd share what I saw. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-k/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [A Smear Campaign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-o/)
I've had races over the years where my opponents and their left-wing Washington allies have attempted to distort my record and mislead voters. After all, this is politics, and as they say, "politics ain't beanbag." Another quote I remember hearing was "politics is a contact sport." I googled that phrase to see who said it, and it was me! No kidding. Try googling it. I thought I had heard it from someone else, but what the heck. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-b/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Our Next Ad](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-p/)
First, an admission. When I watch TV (which is rare these days since I'm in a pretty challenging re-election race this time) I rarely watch commercials. I flip to another station to see what's on, and if there's an ad there, I'll flip to a different station. Drives my wife crazy, so we typically watch stuff on different TV's when I'm in town. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-x/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-m/)
### [PolitiFact is Anything But](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-c/)
President Obama famously mislead the public when he said, referring to ObamaCare," If you like your health insurance, you can keep your health insurance." PolitiFact on six different occasions determined that THIS STATEMENT WAS TRUE! When, over time, it became apparent to virtually everyone that this statement was NOT true, PolitiFact reversed its opinion, and went so far as to declare that Obama's statement was "the lie of the year" in 2013! [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-q/) [Donate](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-a/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-f/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-v/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjurudid-kujkulhluu-e/)

clean_body: Two Weeks Out - So How's the Election Looking? No Images? A lot better than it looked two months ago, or two weeks ago for that matter. I think things are trending in the right direction. The Democrats' advantage on the generic ballot has narrowed significantly - from double digits to low single digits. And in the so-called battleground congressional districts, the ones that are hotly contested this time around (like mine), and will decide which party controls the House after the election, the generic ballot is essentially a dead heat. Previous Weekly Posts As I'm sure you know, President Trump came to town last Friday. And since I kind of had a ring side seat as the whole thing unfolded, I thought I'd share what I saw. I've had races over the years where my opponents and their left-wing Washington allies have attempted to distort my record and mislead voters. After all, this is politics, and as they say, "politics ain't beanbag." Another quote I remember hearing was "politics is a contact sport." I googled that phrase to see who said it, and it was me! No kidding. Try googling it. I thought I had heard it from someone else, but what the heck. First, an admission. When I watch TV (which is rare these days since I'm in a pretty challenging re-election race this time) I rarely watch commercials. I flip to another station to see what's on, and if there's an ad there, I'll flip to a different station. Drives my wife crazy, so we typically watch stuff on different TV's when I'm in town. President Obama famously mislead the public when he said, referring to ObamaCare," If you like your health insurance, you can keep your health insurance." PolitiFact on six different occasions determined that THIS STATEMENT WAS TRUE! When, over time, it became apparent to virtually everyone that this statement was NOT true, PolitiFact reversed its opinion, and went so far as to declare that Obama's statement was "the lie of the year" in 2013! | | | ---|---|--- 2300 Montana Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Senator Kamala Harris is asking you to commit to vote on November 6th
body:
I'll cut to the chase, Activist -- in less than two weeks you will have the opportunity to cast your vote in the midterm elections and send an unmistakable message about the kind of future you want for our country.

That's why I'm asking:

**[Can you commit to vote right now to reaffirm your support for our progressive values of justice, equality, and tolerance? I need to know if you are planning to vote on or before November 6th, Activist.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/N9Oib/6/Da/r5cs/6fSiIJ/zBx4YUEcDZ/P/P)**

We have reached an inflection point in our country's history, when we have to look in the mirror and ask: "Who are we?"

It's easy to feel overwhelmed in moments like these, but we have a chance to change our country right now. With only 12 days left until Election Day, we can stop this administration's relentless attacks on our nation's core values by electing Democrats who will fight for what we stand for -- from voting rights and reproductive rights to workers' rights and LGBTQ rights.

[**Your vote could be the difference between victory or defeat in closely contested elections across the country. Tell me your committed to vote by clicking this link and taking action today, Activist.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/N9Oib/s/Da/r5cs/6fSiIJ/sbbmpuGuKx/P/P)

Years from now, our children and our grandchildren will ask us: "Where were you when Trump was president? What did you do to fight him?"

Make sure you tell them you voted in the 2018 midterms.

Thanks and take care,

-- Kamala ****[Commit to vote](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/N9Oib/v/Da/r5cs/6fSiIJ/68vkRe7tYq/P/P)****
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDM1LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjYzMTA1NDI4)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

body:
We have less than two weeks now, and whole lot to do. Virginia is going to be one of the most critical states to watch as we gauge the future of our country. ------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hey there, Derek - I know it's early but I have a quick message.

We have less than two weeks now, and whole lot to do. **Virginia is going to be one of the most critical states to watch as we gauge the future of our country.**

We have a big goal to close out the month. The ads are made, the mailers and the literature to leave on doorsteps are printed, across the state we're ready to go. [I'm just asking for your help to keep the lights on and keep this program moving through the finish line. name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Medicaid Enrollment Declines for the First Time in More Than a Decade as Strong US Economy Boosts Income for Poor Americans
body:
| |
---
# _Medicaid Enrollment Declines for the First Time in More Than a Decade as Strong US Economy Boosts Income for Poor Americans_
“The booming U.S. economy appears to be reducing dependence on federal health insurance for the poor,” Berkeley Lovelace Jr. reports for CNBC. Medicaid enrollment has fallen for the first time since 2007, and "states largely attribute the enrollment slowdown to a strengthening economy, resulting in fewer new low-income people qualifying for Medicaid,” he adds. [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2NzUxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc1MTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1ODEzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.cnbc.com/2018/10/24/strong-economy-halts-medicaid-growth-as-more-americans-make-too-much.html) “Almost a year after declaring the opioid epidemic a public health emergency, President Donald Trump on Wednesday signed into law a sweeping legislative package that lawmakers and public health experts believe will help curb the growing crisis in the United States,” Marianna Sotomayor reports for [**NBC News**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2NzUxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc1MTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1ODEzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/trump-signs-sweeping-opioid-bill-vow-end-scourge-drug-addiction-n923976) In [_**The Washington Times**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2NzUxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc1MTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1ODEzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/24/democratic-silence-on-migrant-caravan-is-deafening/), Matt Mackowiak writes that Democrats’ complete silence on the approaching migrant caravan is deafening. “America is a compassionate and good-hearted country. We are a generous people. But we cannot allow thousands of economic migrants to break into the country whenever they feel like it,” he explains. “Can anyone cite the Democratic Party view on the caravan?” “If there was one idea that you could say dominates today's Democratic Party, it could be summed up in one word: Socialism. Many Democrats, from Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders to Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren, embrace some form of socialism,” the**[ _Investor’s Business Daily_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2NzUxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc1MTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1ODEzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.investors.com/politics/editorials/socialism-poverty-democrats-standard-of-living/)** editorial board writes. A new White House Council of Economic Advisers report illustrates how America’s economy would look under socialist policies. “The numbers are pretty scary,” the editors argue. In the [_**Mississippi Clarion Ledger**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2NzUxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc1MTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1ODEzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.clarionledger.com/story/news/politics/2018/10/23/ivanka-trump-coming-gulfport-child-care-meeting/1743463002/), Geoff Pender reports that Ivanka Trump will be in Gulfport, Mississippi, today, “meeting with state and community officials about early childhood education and care and workforce training.” Pender adds that Ms. Trump “has made affordable child care a signature issue since her father was running for president and successfully helped lobby Congress for an increase in the child tax credit, included in last year's tax cuts.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2NzUxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc1MTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1ODEzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2NzUxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc1MTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1ODEzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2NzUxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc1MTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA1ODEzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Can I Count On You, Friend
body:
Friend,
There are only 12 days left until election day! We kicked off early voting with marches to the polls, our phone banks are busy and our volunteers are out canvassing the district everyday. We are going to fight as hard as we can to get our message of change for Arkansas.
__**I need your help though. We are up on tv and our efforts in the field are starting to pay off in a major way. But, we need to make sure we keep it up. The ads, the campaign literature, the get out the vote operation all cost money and we are getting tight.**__
[Can I count on you to make a contribution today? I'm grateful for your support!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2830696/17913863/-1826915792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzhhYmRlMS03NWQ4LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FupXTYmObhdXWal0odssy_prPLHipfcMe7MBk4Ft9To=)

I really need your help, friends. We have until 5 p.m. TOMORROW to raise the $25,000 we need to keep our TV ads up, and **we're very close.**
Corporate right-wing groups like the Koch brothers are spending hundreds of thousands to defeat me and keep their friend Chris Sununu in Concord. He _cannot_ be trusted to put the people of New Hampshire over special interests.
That's why I'm fueling my campaign with grassroots support from this team - from _you_. But that means **the ONLY way we can win in November is if you give $5 or more IMMEDIATELY to help us keep our new ad up and reach as many voters as possible before Election Day.**

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Will you stand for this?
body:
Peter,
As if on cue to bring immigration law to the forefront of the midterm elections, we are currently witnessing an exponential number of people on the move – growing in numbers from one country to the next to illegally enter the United States.
**_But let’s be clear. There is a fundamental difference between immigration and invasion_.** We should not yield to people threatening to invade our country, take advantage of our programs, and not assimilate into our communities, whether we like it or not.
Our hearts grieve for many traveling in the migrant caravan who may be seeking to make a new life for themselves. But we must ask ourselves: **Are we a nation of laws or a country without borders?**
To date, we may have as many as 30 million illegal immigrants living in our country. Illegal entry to our country has reduced our ability to vet those who wish us ill—including thousands of members of MS-13, human smugglers, sex traffickers, and drug cartels, contributing to the drug epidemic killing tens of thousands of Americans every year.
Christians should not be afraid to stand strong for the enforcement of our laws and the recognition of our borders. Yes, we are compassionate and respect the dignity of every human life. But **we should not stand for a defiant disregard for laws and threats to our families’ security.**
You know what else we should we not stand for?
We should not stand for abortion – the most severe attack on human life.
We should not stand for threats against religious liberty, Christian business owners unable to live by biblical values, and we should not stand for attacks on marriage and the family unit as God designed.
**Security and sanctity of life, religious freedom, healthy and strong families are worth standing for. They’re worth voting for.**
These are very real issues that will be addressed by those we elect in November.
Here’s the conundrum. While the Bible is clear in Romans 13 that we are to be subject to the governing authorities, not all candidates stand for these Christian values.
Thankfully, in America, we the people still have the right to elect our governing authorities.
So, we need to ask, are the authorities and leaders we elect going to stand with us for biblical values _?_ Are they leaders who will stand up for what _you_ believe in at the local, state and federal level?
They won’t be if millions of Christians don’t stand and vote in these elections.
**[Help us raise up leaders who will stand boldly for biblical values](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181025apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181025com01nd&n=1).**
Across the country, My Faith Votes is mobilizing Christians in churches, on college campuses, as well as people of faith like you through our [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOEazIMywXQhpJyZQpOMiBJBC394nsWh8LjBwKFodVh0oQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181025com01nd&n=2).
[With less than two weeks until Election Day, will you consider donating today to reach fellow believers and remind each of the importance of voting our values](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181025apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181025com01nd&n=3)?
**I’m counting on Christians to stand for our values— to impact the course of our midterm elections and 21 st century history.**
Help us mobilize Christians to get to the polls in these remaining days before the election.

clean_body: Peter, As if on cue to bring immigration law to the forefront of the midterm elections, we are currently witnessing an exponential number of people on the move – growing in numbers from one country to the next to illegally enter the United States. But let’s be clear. There is a fundamental difference between immigration and invasion. We should not yield to people threatening to invade our country, take advantage of our programs, and not assimilate into our communities, whether we like it or not. Our hearts grieve for many traveling in the migrant caravan who may be seeking to make a new life for themselves. But we must ask ourselves: Are we a nation of laws or a country without borders? To date, we may have as many as 30 million illegal immigrants living in our country. Illegal entry to our country has reduced our ability to vet those who wish us ill—including thousands of members of MS-13, human smugglers, sex traffickers, and drug cartels, contributing to the drug epidemic killing tens of thousands of Americans every year. Christians should not be afraid to stand strong for the enforcement of our laws and the recognition of our borders. Yes, we are compassionate and respect the dignity of every human life. But we should not stand for a defiant disregard for laws and threats to our families’ security. You know what else we should we not stand for? We should not stand for abortion – the most severe attack on human life. We should not stand for threats against religious liberty, Christian business owners unable to live by biblical values, and we should not stand for attacks on marriage and the family unit as God designed. Security and sanctity of life, religious freedom, healthy and strong families are worth standing for. They’re worth voting for. These are very real issues that will be addressed by those we elect in November. Here’s the conundrum. While the Bible is clear in Romans 13 that we are to be subject to the governing authorities, not all candidates stand for these Christian values. Thankfully, in America, we the people still have the right to elect our governing authorities. So, we need to ask, are the authorities and leaders we elect going to stand with us for biblical values ? Are they leaders who will stand up for what you believe in at the local, state and federal level? They won’t be if millions of Christians don’t stand and vote in these elections. . Across the country, My Faith Votes is mobilizing Christians in churches, on college campuses, as well as people of faith like you through our . ? I’m counting on Christians to stand for our values— to impact the course of our midterm elections and 21 st century history. Help us mobilize Christians to get to the polls in these remaining days before the election. United. We Stand. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Voting starts NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This just got real.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379779/7ab0e2c4/7e6eb62b/34984f65/2200542385/VEsH/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/early_voting.html") Friend, Today, early voting begins in Maryland. We're depending on Democrats to turn out in record numbers this year to win -- that's because we need more than **_1 million votes_** to beat Larry Hogan. It won't be easy, but we can do it with your help. **Don't wait until Election Day to vote -- do it now. It's the same process as voting the day of, but you skip the lines -- and it leaves you more time to get other folks to the polls.** [**Learn more about early voting in Maryland and find your polling place today!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379779/7ab0e2c4/7e6eb62b/34984f65/2200542385/VEsE/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/early_voting.html") Thank you -- this is getting real, and every success we've had is because of the hard work and support of folks like you. When we win next month, I won't forget that. Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379779/7ab0e2c4/7e6eb62b/34984f64/2200542385/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-early-vote?refcode=OHQ10258Ab")

subject: Let's make history, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We need your help this weekend.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12039a5/2fde7c66/49889650/156869af/294995346/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_btm_deadline6&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Friend,

Want to be part of the team that changes the course of North Carolina's future?

There's a really fun way to make a huge difference: knock on doors with Break the Majority this weekend! Talking to voters is the _single best_ _way_ to make a significant impact on our state.

Breaking the majority won't be easy. We need to make sure we have huge numbers going to the polls -- and it's up to us to make sure that happens.

**This weekend, October 27-28, we'll be making calls and knocking on doors to make sure we Break the Majority. Are you in?** | [I'M IN](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12039a5/2fde7c66/49889650/156869ae/294995346/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ncdems/")
---
Over the last year and a half, we've been building up one of the best grassroots organizing teams this state has ever seen. Now, with Early Vote in full swing and Election Day less than two weeks away, we have to sprint and lean into the finish line.
Join the thousands of North Carolinians who have already signed up to help Break the Majority:
[**https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ncdems/**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12039a5/2fde7c66/49889650/156869ae/294995346/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ncdems/")
Thanks for your continued support,
Sydney Watnick
Field Director
Break the Majority

name: Leah
subject: Did you see President Trump last night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
After the MAGA rally last night, I had a chance to talk with the President and share the many notes you all left for him. I shared your concerns with
****

Friend,

Wow. What a day. As soon as President Trump touched down, I could feel the energy of not only our President, but the thousands of Wisconsinites in attendance ready to beat Senator Baldwin.

After the MAGA rally last night, I had a chance to talk with the President and share the many notes you all left for him. I shared your concerns with Baldwin’s ridiculous plan to replace health care as we know it with an expensive, government-run system. I shared your messages of thanks for slashing taxes across the country and increasing the dollars in our pockets.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPg0TCcM-qQWKWGQrZdLAw5RiT7QZtSw3_b8O6pVN8Rh7o5gWPsliVg9LhPeqYV__9BAlbT89sE5DdAiiEMhXKD5cMwnZ32SCTKBJOKyDbwaZqDxdQ98lSXss5N4kXZ6rupLpFah_dPebFLUn1c-LV1ZvIM86iSfZQiIbYRMa8XTYBeFKlksaFAA9OKf6cMNaXcGKqjCbqw6C74Ot8xzWxfVYv-VeC4WP6O05UlYzLp-jfb9GSpGT32KRDDW7ORuhHPDqxQK0EhjWlD-sebym-IUC7yGGWjtKmCgqeur7mjAxNuOKEAzUgEjLxQgCgV243qWuydPPR-funmRrMm0pBW0TtJNhTY59bRyZlZBnOma_ZweJVShTAOuifCZFyoQ8BvlKapfVJrptR6ZS-facenM%3D)

President Trump made it clear: he **needs** an ally in the U.S. Senate to help him execute on his promises made to the American people. Senator Baldwin couldn’t be anything further from that.

What we need is someone dedicated to boosting up Wisconsin’s middle class. Someone who has a record of fighting for conservative causes and never giving up.

[**I need you to stand with President Trump and send me to the Senate to be a voice for our Wisconsin values.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPg0TCcM-qQWKWGQrZdLAw5RiT7QZtSw3_b8O6pVN8Rh7o5gWPsliVg9LhPeqYV__9BAlbT89sE5DdAiiEMhXKD5cMwnZ32SCTKBJOKyDbwaZqDxdQ98lSXss5N4kXZ6rupLpFah_dPebFLUn1c-LV1ZvIM86iSfZQiIbYRMa8XTYtNLmSkcixcCOb_DyLFI9v9EUjaiyl8E72i-zcr_F97VV40U-0PP1qN9_E2yrm4Fi_3DPEVzWrFH3wTR8ys0Wso1qg0WiXJSuI6T8c5YgP-MDv-M9dOIsJB3SOiRW-JoIpmgRD3CpsXYuC6n7sey0e87ciu8TyuzoS6Wr-NJ-gzzXZz8_nYih-OZVOvAg5lRGXUyVyjsTpy7HKmbDSFOP1zRwvHwCqHzPNNqAziGgmwE%3D)

**[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP! CHIP IN>>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPg0TCcM-qQWKWGQrZdLAw5RiT7QZtSw3_b8O6pVN8Rh7o5gWPsliVg9LhPeqYV__9BAlbT89sE5DdAiiEMhXKD5cMwnZ32SCTKBJOKyDbwaZqDxdQ98lSXss5N4kXZ6rupLpFah_dPebFLUn1c-LV1ZvIM86iSfZQiIbYRMa8XTYhd5Rf__UNg0pSmcTrU0m36qODitsHmdg-IM0IuVgQz5ZQzng0IGkaNjyoRHz1TIsF2CSL61PiSgB1SL78ExkEKzRIY_lN_xMyCG3WtEsK6i1QyKXW3v1RBY_8JMazmqzlJERriEEocHBeaXxtfGBtVg4bDxiDx1nBN8WT6LyTHeoa7L7RTVFDBDcKXpY3CubNQPKuoqYQhuUjlLbXEgaoxafYyU5P-y6eazwADi8xlk%3D)**
---
** **
President Trump needs you. He is getting the job done for Americans, but the Democrats are hell-bent on wiping out everything on his agenda with their so-called “blue wave.”

We need to show President Trump that we are with him 100% and STOP Tammy Baldwin in her tracks.

She sides with the liberal mob, resisting everything the President does. From erasing our tax cuts to taking away our Second Amendment rights, Baldwin stands with those whose only goal is to obstruct and resist the president. They must be stopped.

**[STOP BALDWIN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPg0TCcM-qQWKWGQrZdLAw5RiT7QZtSw3_b8O6pVN8Rh7o5gWPsliVg9LhPeqYV__9BAlbT89sE5DdAiiEMhXKD5cMwnZ32SCTKBJOKyDbwaZqDxdQ98lSXss5N4kXZ6rupLpFah_dPebFLUn1c-LV1ZvIM86iSfZQiIbYRMa8XTY0HBmv1Myc6xj4NvF985p-tj0i8KowmV73aFone-6oXYAtIyZ9n0zsUOseKeBWQ_FM81C4C_MxOYkVFMUkEFG5BA7KMvfX0bNPGZrII2ULzJag5PtxxdfcGWPLNstN4qO_YztpcyAeatsyHKysNUua-zyXxDO9yJL1lhz3VL56Sxft5JUZFYlH-qV0SyYDUblJWuIOF9FqwaxEyRg110TPjShlCLxf3lUMJBhpb1lr3Q%3D)**
---

Friend, President Trump has fired up Wisconsin. He has asked us to do him a favor. He NEEDS us to stop Tammy Baldwin.

[**Will you fight with him?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPg0TCcM-qQWKWGQrZdLAw5RiT7QZtSw3_b8O6pVN8Rh7o5gWPsliVg9LhPeqYV__9BAlbT89sE5DdAiiEMhXKD5cMwnZ32SCTKBJOKyDbwaZqDxdQ98lSXss5N4kXZ6rupLpFah_dPebFLUn1c-LV1ZvIM86iSfZQiIbYRMa8XTYF9gY533kbdFde-DEVAOpu3syl8JTopkulvyYROgZxzgR2f-z_YfcxVB-F7KOT90ECBeP4ci-h0pgCqFD5LoosyH4OAyIotY9t-SNzyJamjnZG6Y_qwLx9ABrG0SQfK-4L0t0jqAe6d3zFcBzX7KUPIWJlMhAwpzvaMxxYhQhRLuOpVzw5MMPIzmOOcxvDQYhSvABqwFpfz0ObPjH9IX7T3XtjAYy2odpBnSAM2X4V0A%3D)

Leah

** **
**[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPtCfrWFs_1xfhTB7vQRPBaVRH6TuJam_oVLLqQnyTT6P4KzQXyN5CKgYPfBkZTHJ7HEf0ay1LbQQSCDbeyDiJbQkoPLLaDgzsUrhZ73xJyW-N1UUa9GwGcDOlRHsYjpKdfB9xTN0bQqmjQCAeZDKlOhSIO-kwmDEvZhXr0Ze32fVuYwN1rAyztUndV3LfJ7aj53nO02zJ1uvh5ZntLD9e2U8qk0A7fX2Q23_XgUTwyiONTyc9YJ1CmIX9nL2oWHSUA%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPvqWxGAKKa_xw6SOgEqxIIbLkIN7_mMJXPyDd5ZiKakNwPUIEpAlddGrje66ZIfp2ujNw9E6RF7O23CH8otIiGPIGS4vFdkVorSY0SXD-BVk7OIJn9jVaOdTXkJ1cAIctEtKBXvu_wFytp4_zxhzKSy2H8xRPb5M0tK3rFimCmNSkLr289U1L4MsFpDHGDEvRVGP-DD54pQMDqRnAEJBM3wWGSXju8gwQXWThD4MBhXf0tYCWs7fPISB3uPEjBFxHw%3D%3D) **

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPsRWH7FRCxlZQ4pr9D5xjip18XQbigx895HWnW83SJTBprhYTMScz5njcEN_C-PbB57DgkvJPWSOyBXi-ew3qa0csfVQmVtYeAGITuXLYGLMxVbJb6uKOwaY9wNaWLfycZS4U0uvCh9IyqtSeTIvGxl4ycQF64ZrYDgyISrpVzwvDUf5u_ZyjuTOzU5gl1t3xWw3ZW97Dj_I3UjyGP_Eq5FtIw0V1OVeUB8O6zylsql4gFRwYVoALqsgY3FZd_h05uydcVl-CRERnWQ-UZozRWPOjtwOGyaH3ZFz12328OOISdyZ-5QHiBqkaPfSkmrYt1hEB1gjJ-7pf5bDPvI90PKCGXFajJSWt06KPQCWKxoN) that you care about? So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPsRWH7FRCxlZQ4pr9D5xjiqTnu3oCwFKCahJ35MwaRox-nPJ4fe_Tas_vBkDSJC2u46fRqu2ErMipKujIYb2g44XTFVVTNFq5rwm-N3pFQ3ZjbDjpsaKb5CwdqQ-WOXPmqlF7__p58z6011JYlxZxk7fdrTrXnGUcj_q9ualzG3_MjHv4N5rvicMljUH1dRn41o0Ejg0g3xRv29SU45b49ulzvGhfDtCndo-S5sCWUN5e8j5ASqcmWWS4hqK4ZQhoRIJ50dfmHKmKU6CO86zxPYpvXhXBpH-EvRs47FVwuLHp3g7rDlIEHbCan6Un7KL79KD_aLYjw7NTd_E8tbySYWb9ciFC0IzcvULeGFPxoCv) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPtCfrWFs_1xfhTB7vQRPBaVRH6TuJam_oVLLqQnyTT6PeRoVJsccXuX-a5mt6c9hlsA6zYW1QRMcnNAoSzBR6jIoh4Tl8lyD07FGPDKGynZlBu_S17E1Hu0Oeq3diT6na4pZe15kJN-zg89BNuCM8gO7CTAZnFwtBVlOm28y80C50zbj2g2JQbV077JzCSiNmitWgzyIpR6uADnut17GgNvJGrxwauNpC0M4yHb2PZgoZduQba8gPpcqgbIhM63T7Q%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPvqWxGAKKa_xw6SOgEqxIIbLkIN7_mMJXPyDd5ZiKakNDHtfZKnRsOlmDbcPRs8_rcq3IuKJrnefwzLxQMwpI6l2WOSIv2Mram9bsEZit3wLt6eeZ5CqygnYCU6_I6IlhMje9PO7SaIVna_MtVVGyxj4cMuWaIrka3vqOJfQucRIiDjurPu6KafrazyBHgCU1mHj9r9xTYw6yFFXQg1wvQdJJU-8hpAO4HxFGRqq35253KXrBc3GRvbXqi2466fVxw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7a21578815184125b8550f8bbf3ec43e&_e=v-iMaQlbk0aY5EGVNDpRPjE8-6bb9mH6VLipfD-66E7zUrQ5KijDJsZUHfcXoXZjm6-L8Ybkp-xdRgDyqvIR18Y6CZ-1mGTAjX7Uz3ly2QHidxrg5q3AR64wv4YzEEZIRe0NiRC52M4p9WeOyRJkuQZUVfvAzhnDjUG0lFNTxHvHZbIWN1VHK5zpQ-Y4lJvc1YQW32BgThBbRzOARuN3UWc_I9Xl074OuAUHLszhS-pBYb4UIAZ9QECOYZeUcFVLsFQRx_Snann3-VofqK7vbA%3D%3D) feed. clean_body: After the MAGA rally last night, I had a chance to talk with the President and share the many notes you all left for him. I shared your concerns with ** Friend, Wow. What a day. As soon as President Trump touched down, I could feel the energy of not only our President, but the thousands of Wisconsinites in attendance ready to beat Senator Baldwin. After the MAGA rally last night, I had a chance to talk with the President and share the many notes you all left for him. I shared your concerns with Baldwin’s ridiculous plan to replace health care as we know it with an expensive, government-run system. I shared your messages of thanks for slashing taxes across the country and increasing the dollars in our pockets. President Trump made it clear: he needs an ally in the U.S. Senate to help him execute on his promises made to the American people. Senator Baldwin couldn’t be anything further from that. What we need is someone dedicated to boosting up Wisconsin’s middle class. Someone who has a record of fighting for conservative causes and never giving up. President Trump needs you. He is getting the job done for Americans, but the Democrats are hell-bent on wiping out everything on his agenda with their so-called “blue wave.” We need to show President Trump that we are with him 100% and STOP Tammy Baldwin in her tracks. She sides with the liberal mob, resisting everything the President does. From erasing our tax cuts to taking away our Second Amendment rights, Baldwin stands with those whose only goal is to obstruct and resist the president. They must be stopped. Friend, President Trump has fired up Wisconsin. He has asked us to do him a favor. He NEEDS us to stop Tammy Baldwin. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: tinaforminnesota.com
subject: A couple shifts short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We had to come to you.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d291/c1f7015/6f2fc340/114085ad/917643345/VEsH/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/teamtina/?utm_source=rtw_20181025_em") Friend, We had to come to you. We're organizing our phone banks and canvasses for this weekend and we are coming up short of the volunteers we need to reach the voters in our get out the vote plan this weekend. Falling short, even a shift or two across our offices, could be the difference in this race. We know midterm elections in Minnesota are close -- sometimes just a few hundred votes. That's why we're coming to you now. **[Will you find a spot and sign up to volunteer this weekend? name: Team Morse
subject: Here's who is counting on us to win:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HBBdP1Mh25MWXtQpXa4qvqmZXJl8UkId-hyq7tGasvc=/t8g8Lu8-jW0AZfKQ3TAlqeGRyt0RHS-fxeGrfs-N-qk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181025_TM_20181025-counting_all_logo)
Who is counting on us to win? It's a long list, Peter.
With just under two weeks left, we wanted to remind you of what's at stake for our community in this election, including:
* **The 160,000 seniors in our district who rely on Social Security and Medicare:** Tom McClintock, who voted for a tax plan that will create a $1.8 billion deficit, intends to slash these programs to pay for it.
* **The 300,000 folks in our district with pre-existing conditions:** Congressman McClintock called pre-existing conditions "nuisances" and admitted his own plan would make it "difficult" for those with pre-existing conditions to find healthcare.
* **The 88% of college graduates in our district who carry student debt:** The average grad owes more than $25,000 that McClintock won't fight to relieve.
* **The 150,000 children in our district who will inherit a climate crisis** (since Tom McClintock doesn't believe in climate change).

It's a long list, Peter. And it's a stark reminder of why it's so important that we win this race.
**For 18 months, you 've fought by our side--and in this final stretch, we need you standing strong by us as we fight to retire McClintock and build a better future for our community. Invest in that future with a donation now: **
[$5 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/HBBdP1Mh25MWXtQpXa4qvqmZXJl8UkId-hyq7tGasvc=/t8g8Lu8-jW0AZfKQ3TAlqeGRyt0RHS-fxeGrfs-N-qk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181025_TM_20181025-counting_all_5&amount=5) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/HBBdP1Mh25MWXtQpXa4qvqmZXJl8UkId-hyq7tGasvc=/t8g8Lu8-jW0AZfKQ3TAlqeGRyt0RHS-fxeGrfs-N-qk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181025_TM_20181025-counting_all_25&amount=25)

Last quarter, Lou Barletta caught up with Bob's fundraising, and now he's pulled ahead. The most recent reports show that Barletta has raised $7,100 more than Bob from high-dollar donors over the past five days.

**There are only 12 days left in this campaign -- we can't let Bob fall behind now.**

Bob and Barletta are putting their final ads on the air, making strategic organizing decisions and approving get-out-the-vote plans. Those all cost money, and we cannot afford to go into these critical final days with fewer resources than Barletta.

Lou Barletta has repeatedly voted to take away protections for people with pre-existing conditions, admitted that he would vote to gut Social Security and Medicare and has received more support from President Trump than any other candidate. He cannot win on November 6. Period.

**Bob needs your help now more than ever. Please, if you can, rush $5 or more to help close the fundraising gap before midnight:**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181025_fr1_nd_pa&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks.

There are only 12 days left in this campaign -- we can't let Bob fall behind now. Bob and Barletta are putting their final ads on the air, making strategic organizing decisions and approving get-out-the-vote plans. Those all cost money, and we cannot afford to go into these critical final days with fewer resources than Barletta. Lou Barletta has repeatedly voted to take away protections for people with pre-existing conditions, admitted that he would vote to gut Social Security and Medicare and has received more support from President Trump than any other candidate. He cannot win on November 6. Period. Bob needs your help now more than ever. Please, if you can, rush $5 or more to help close the fundraising gap before midnight: "" Thanks. | | If you'll be away from home on Election Day, you need to request your absentee ballot now to make sure you're able to vote. The deadline to request an absentee ballot is October 30. "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: something has happened, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
As you may know, everyone, the majority of contributions to my reelection campaign come from messages like this one. I know they can be really annoying sometimes, but they make a huge difference for our team -- that's why, with 12 days until the election, Maggie said that I could reach out to you.
Something has happened in the last few days. According to my finance and digital staffers, fewer people are opening these messages or making donations to our campaign over the last few days.
I don't want to alarm you, but that's a serious problem for our campaign -- especially given that President Trump just made a campaign stop in Wisconsin. The truth is, my right-wing opponent can count on millionaires and billionaires to cut outrageous checks to dark money super PACs to win, but I refuse to play that game. I want to win the right way.
So, if we're going to hold our own in the final two weeks against all these attacks and win this thing on November 6th, we need to catch back up on our goals -- quickly. And if we're going to do that it's going to come from messages like these, because I am never going to beg billionaires to start a super PAC for me.
[**Do you think you could add a contribution of $3 or more right now as part of our emergency push to get our grassroots fundraising back on track today? I need your help more than ever.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1f2/2a380d31/36444814/f1671e/466289984/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0dGIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAyNV9NV0g0VEItVEJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4tb?refcode=e20181025_MWH4TB-TB_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you for everything you do for our campaign. A lot of my colleagues wish they had supporters like you they could count on in moments like these. I know how lucky I am to have you on my team.
Thanks again,
Tammy

subject: tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
We're closing the gap, but this race is far from won. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa767/34a064cc/1c02c85/70d4bfe/434760969/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, Tonight is our last public fundraising deadline of this campaign, so we wanted to take a moment to explain why these emails are so important: Ours is the closest governor's race in the country. Period. It's all because of you - hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you got us to this point. We're closing the gap, but this race is far from won. That's why Donald Trump is tweeting in support of our opponent and the NRA is on the attack, spending _over a million dollars_ on ads. National Republicans will do whatever it takes to maintain power in Georgia. We can't let up now. Unlike our opponent, our campaign is fueled by lots of people chipping in small amounts. So when you see that this is a close race, emails like this (and supporters like you) helped make that happen. We've only got 12 days left to secure this election for Stacey Abrams and for every Georgia family counting on us to win. So we have to ask: **[Can you make a $3 donation to Stacey Abrams' campaign for Governor before tonight's fundraising deadline? If we can put up a strong showing on this public report, we can make history on Election Day.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa767/34a064cc/1c02c85/70d4bff/434760969/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI1MjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10252018-full")** With early voting already underway, and just 12 days before Election Day, every donation we receive is immediately turned around to help us Get Out The Vote. There couldn't be a more important time to give. Thank you for stepping up with us. \- Team Abrams

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I have to get this off my chest.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Add your name to say you're ready to fight for climate action on Team Jay.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b431/2f5ea88d/740c2e64/2cbd9421/3502576168/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/team-jay?utm_source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, I have to get something off my chest: **Donald Trump is just a blip in history.** No matter how it feels to be constantly tormented by the news cycle, we've got to remember -- no other nation in the world has followed him over his cliff of climate denial. And neither should we. Across the country, from Maine to New Mexico, from Florida to Nevada, people are supporting Democrats who are leading on climate and clean energy. In just 12 days, when America votes, we're going to see a mighty chorus ring out to say climate change is real. We're going to sing it loud and clear: **Climate deniers, your time is up.** [**We'll show Trump and the anti-science Republicans there is a price to pay for failing to act on climate. But we'll all need to work to make that chorus ring true, and we must do our part right here right now. So tell me today, are you with us, or against us?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b431/2f5ea88d/740c2e64/2cbd9421/3502576168/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/team-jay?utm_source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") | [I'M WITH JAY »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b431/2f5ea88d/740c2e64/2cbd9421/3502576168/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/team-jay?utm_source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
---
Here's the thing about Trump's scare tactics -- they're trying to overwhelm us to inaction. But we do not have to cower in the shadows and remain passive. Together, we are challenged with one of history's GREATEST endeavors, to save our little blue planet and those living on it from the danger and massive threat of climate change.
This is a time of great peril, but also of great promise.
A time of raging forest fires, but also of spectacular advances in solar energy.
A time of acidifying oceans, but also of the stunning arrival of electric cars.
A time of fossil fuel emissions, but also of clean energy opportunities.
**Confronting climate change IS the defining challenge of our generation. And we are taking it on here in WA and leading the country. Are you with me? Sign on to say you're on my team:**
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b431/2f5ea88d/740c2e64/2cbd9421/3502576168/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/team-jay?utm_source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b431/2f5ea88d/740c2e64/2cbd9420/3502576168/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-10-24_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Where the money is being spent:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Together, our grassroots network has accomplished so much -- but today, I
need to share some critical information with you.

You know we've raised a lot of money for this race -- but I’m telling you right now: we can’t slow
down. Even though the official reports show that our campaign is
out-raising Cruz’s, this doesn’t take into account all the money from the
eleven super PACs backing Cruz. We don’t exactly know how much they have,
but we know that it’s millions.

What's going to matter in the last days of this campaign -- what's going
to cut through the noise of all the negative ads and crazy tweets -- is
the same thing that always has: people talking to people. Our path to
electing Beto is made possible by people, not PACs. So what our work looks
like from now through November 6 is by no means run-of-the-mill. And it’s
the most ambitious project that I’ve ever been part of.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181025&t=1019&akid=21218%2E444211%2ECS967e ]I want you to know exactly what we’re doing between now and November 6
to elect Beto -- and I want to ask you to help fund it before October 31,
when the month is out.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181025&t=1020&akid=21218%2E444211%2ECS967e ]Contribute
$3
»

Because your contributions mean so much to us, I want you to know exactly
where the money is being spent. Here’s our plan:

* Execute the largest ‘get out the vote’ organizing operation in Texas
history. There’s never been such a massive or sophisticated field
program like this one in the state of Texas. It’s one of the largest
of its kind for a US Senate race. Hundreds of field staff are working
day and night to support thousands of volunteers who are contacting
millions of voters. And we’re using the most advanced tactics and
technology to do it.

* Make sure Beto’s positive vision reaches millions of Texans online and
via TV ads. Eleven outside groups are spending millions attacking Beto
with negative ads to try to mislead voters. We need to keep countering
their attacks across all 20 media markets in Texas and online.

* Mobilize historic numbers of young people to vote and volunteer. Young
Texans are on the front lines, leading the fight for our values -- and
they have the power to help swing this election. No political pollster
would tell Beto to campaign on college campuses -- but we’re engaging
with and organizing alongside thousands of young people who are
volunteering and voting for Beto.

* Lead and support thousands of organizing events between now and
November 6. There will be huge numbers of phone banks all across
Texas. There will be rallies and town halls. And there will be
unprecedented levels of door-knocking events in all 254 counties of
Texas, including this weekend when we’re knocking on 400,000 doors.

We rely 100% on people like you, contributing via emails like this one, to
power these efforts.

When we win this November, not only will we be able to make huge progress
toward a future that works for all of us (in Texas and for the country) --
but we will also set a precedent that it’s possible to win an election
without selling out.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181025&t=1021&akid=21218%2E444211%2ECS967e ]If this is a path that you believe in, we need your help to fund it.
We have an important deadline at the end of this month, and we’re
about $250,000 short of the amount we need to cover our costs.

Thank you for everything so far,

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181025&t=1022&akid=21218%2E444211%2ECS967e ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181025footer&t=1023&akid=21218%2E444211%2ECS967e

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=21218%2E444211%2ECS967e

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Team Gillum
subject: Mayor Gillum was the first in his family to graduate college, but he knows that's not everyone's path:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3622/9e00690/541245a1/24002b1e/2958498180/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")
Friends,

Mayor Andrew Gillum's proposal for Florida is pretty simple: He wants our state and economy to work for every Floridian, no matter which rung of the economic ladder they fall on.

Mayor Gillum was the first in his immediate family to graduate from college -- but he knows higher education isn't the path for every Floridian. He believes that everyone, regardless of what they look like or where they live, deserves to earn a good wage that doesn't require them to have three jobs.

**[Watch our new TV ad, and then chip in $5 to make sure voters across the state hear about our bold, progressive plans.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3622/9e00690/541245a1/24002b11/2958498180/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-skills-ad?gpsid=13_55_4138&refcode=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Watch+our+new+TV+ad+and+then+chip+in++as")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3622/9e00690/541245a1/24002b10/2958498180/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-skills-ad?gpsid=13_55_4138&refcode=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=3")
As Governor, Mayor Gillum will make sure students receive the skills and training they need to get a job with dignity that won't leave them with mountains of crippling debt. Floridians deserve to do what they're good at -- and Mayor Gillum will fight for every Floridian's opportunity to succeed and live a fulfilled life.

**[We just need your help to make sure every voter knows it before Tuesday, November 6. So please, watch our new TV ad and then chip in $5 to help us keep it on the air.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3622/9e00690/541245a1/24002b13/2958498180/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-skills-ad?gpsid=13_55_4138&refcode=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=4+-+We+just+need+your+help+to+make+sure+ever")**

Thank you,

Team Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3622/9e00690/541245a1/24002b12/2958498180/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-skills-ad?gpsid=13_55_4138&refcode=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181024_SkilAD_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=5+-+DONATE")

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: I wanted you to hear directly from me
body:
| Peter, in the coming days, you’ll be hearing from my team a lot, and I wanted to first explain why it’s so important that we keep you in the loop as we hit the final stretch of this campaign. Let me be clear about this: your donations have powered this grassroots movement, helping us to spread our message of working together to get things done. **But we can’t stop now.** It’s so important that we have the resources we need to stay on the offensive. We’ve come together to bring fresh air to Washington, to bring leadership that puts politics aside and takes on the big problems we face. And now we’re almost to the finish line -- so I’m asking: **Can you pitch in $10, or whatever you can, to fuel our campaign ahead of our end-of-month deadline? name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: ‘It’s time to end the global freeloading once and for all’
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 25, 2018
# ‘It’s time to end the global freeloading once and for all’
**For far too long** , the United States has been footing the bill for lower drug prices—in foreign countries. American patients and taxpayers unfairly subsidize worldwide drug innovation while patients overseas get much lower prices from drug makers. Medicare in particular has shouldered an outrageously high burden. **Today, President Donald J. Trump** is launching actions to confront global freeloading and lower medicine prices for American patients. The heart of the effort is simple: putting forward a new way for Medicare to pay for certain drugs that is based on prices that other developed countries pay. **That action alone** is projected to reduce Medicare’s payments for these drugs by an incredible 30 percent over the next five years. And a related plan will fix the perverse incentives for doctors to administer more expensive drugs to patients. **Driving down drug costs** has been a top priority for this President since day one, and Americans are already seeing results:
* In the 100 days following the release of President Trump’s blueprint for lower drug costs, more than a dozen drug companies reduced their list prices, rolled back planned price increases, or froze their prices for the rest of the year.
* The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) set a new record for generic approvals last year, approving more than 1,000 generics that will bring an estimated _$9 billion_ in savings in 2018.
* President Trump signed a law to end unfair gag clauses, which prevented pharmacists from telling patients when they could pay less out of pocket than if they used insurance to cover certain medicines.

[**President Trump: “It’s time to end global freeloading once and for all.”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2Nzc1NzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc3NTc5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA2MDgyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-lowering-drug-prices-american-patients-saving-taxpayer-dollars-confronting-global-freeloading/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch:[The results from President Trump’s plan are pouring in.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2Nzc1NzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc3NTc5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA2MDgyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1055531741920792578)**
## Vice President Pence surveys damage in Florida
**Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence** traveled to the Florida Panhandle today, meeting with residents and surveying the damage from Hurricane Michael. **In Panama City** , the Vice President and Second Lady received a briefing about the storm’s impact on Tyndall Air Force Base. Vice President Pence assured Tyndall’s military families that the base will be rebuilt. In fact, $100 million has already been designated to help with cleanup and recovery at the site. **Before departing** , the Vice President and Second Lady also visited Hiland Park Baptist Church and met with military families affected by the storm to assure them they have the full support of President Trump and the Administration. **[Watch: Vice President Pence updates Floridians on the ongoing recovery effort](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2Nzc1NzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc3NTc5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA2MDgyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://twitter.com/VP/status/1055501267093512192)**
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**First Lady Melania Trump, Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos, and students from Digital Pioneers Academy wave at the camera Tuesday prior to a screening of the motion picture 'Wonder' in the White House Theater** | October 23, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2Nzc1NzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc3NTc5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA2MDgyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2Nzc1NzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc3NTc5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA2MDgyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDI1Ljk2Nzc1NzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAyNS45Njc3NTc5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDA2MDgyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Sen. Claire McCaskill
subject: not looking good, Friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I hate to say it, Friends, but things aren't looking good. Roll Call says I'm the ** _most vulnerable Democrat_** in the entire country, and my opponent, Josh Hawley, and his GOP backers will do anything to flip this seat. **They've already spent over $45 million attacking me - and you can bet there's more where that came from.
**
You know what happens if we let them win? They'll strip healthcare from millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions and allow a reckless trade war that hurts our farmers and manufacturers to continue. President Trump will get another rubber stamp for the most dangerous parts of his agenda.

**We can't let that happen. We CAN stop them, but only if grassroots supporters like you give right now:
**
[**Please, Friends, click here to rush a donation to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat so we can win and fight back against the worst parts of President Trump's agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk932-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Claire McCaskill and Jeanne Shaheen:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk932-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk932-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk932-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk932-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you for being a crucial part of this team.

Claire
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | I hate to say it, Friends, but things aren't looking good. Roll Call says I'm the most vulnerable Democrat in the entire country, and my opponent, Josh Hawley, and his GOP backers will do anything to flip this seat. They've already spent over $45 million attacking me - and you can bet there's more where that came from. You know what happens if we let them win? They'll strip healthcare from millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions and allow a reckless trade war that hurts our farmers and manufacturers to continue. President Trump will get another rubber stamp for the most dangerous parts of his agenda. We can't let that happen. We CAN stop them, but only if grassroots supporters like you give right now: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Claire McCaskill and Jeanne Shaheen: Thank you for being a crucial part of this team. Claire | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Protect Joe Donnelly
subject: HUGE favor (not asking for money!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

In 2016, we saw how a small number of votes can determine which party wins an election. This year, the same dynamic will play out: **If we want Democrats to take back the Senate, we HAVE to win votes in Indiana!**

And the #1 way you can help? **Encourage your friends and family to VOTE for Joe Donnelly, and _make sure they have a plan!_** Here are some of the questions our organizers have found most effective:
* _The early voting period is from October 10 until noon on November 5. What day are you going to vote?_
* _When will voting fit into your schedule that day?_
* _Do you know where your early voting location is?**[(Look it up here for Indiana voters.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2837457/17970053/1099622071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk2NTcwYy1hOWQ4LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60qBaSxcDVdXnS6y2GEAmv5DhmRTPEZy0k3qrv_7PRw=)**_

And if your friends or family members need more motivation to get to the polls, remind them of this: **whether or not you vote is public information. Everyone will know who failed to make their voice heard in November. NOBODY wants to get called out for not voting after the disaster of President Trump’s first two years in office!**

Peter, there are only TWELVE DAYS LEFT before Election Day. If we’re going to put Democrats back in charge, we need ALL Hoosiers to get to the polls and vote for Joe Donnelly.

**So don’t wait![Find your early voting location now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2837458/17970054/1099622071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk2NTcwYy1hOWQ4LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60qBaSxcDVdXnS6y2GEAmv5DhmRTPEZy0k3qrv_7PRw=) and make sure your friends and family have a plan to VOTE!**

Thanks,
Indiana Democrats | **[**FIND YOUR EARLY VOTING LOCATION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2837459/17970055/1099622071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk2NTcwYy1hOWQ4LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60qBaSxcDVdXnS6y2GEAmv5DhmRTPEZy0k3qrv_7PRw=)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: are you ready to change this country?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- There are just TWO weekends between now and Election Day. [**I 'm personally asking: Can you volunteer this weekend to help make sure we defend this Senate seat and elect Democrats up-and-down the ticket?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeeb/4462dc26/720b8b17/201f2a3d/2911464404/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181025b") The energy I'm seeing around the state is remarkable. This week I met some great volunteers at a phonebank in Toledo, where they gathered to make calls on behalf of Democratic candidates. | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeeb/4462dc26/720b8b17/201f2a3d/2911464404/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181025b")
---
I also stopped by a canvass kickoff in Euclid and made a few calls myself.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeeb/4462dc26/720b8b17/201f2a3d/2911464404/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181025b")
---
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeeb/4462dc26/720b8b17/201f2a3d/2911464404/VEsC/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181025b")
---
Spending time with volunteers before they go out and knock on doors in their communities is nothing short of inspiring.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeeb/4462dc26/720b8b17/201f2a3d/2911464404/VEsD/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181025b")
---
[**We need all hands on deck. Sign up now to help us knock on doors, make phone calls, and text out the vote.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeeb/4462dc26/720b8b17/201f2a3d/2911464404/VEsA/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181025b")
For months, I've been traveling the state, talking about how together, we have the power to change this state -- and this country. Right now, we have a chance to do just that. [**Don 't sit these next two weeks out.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeeb/4462dc26/720b8b17/201f2a3d/2911464404/VEsB/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181025b")
With gratitude,
Sherrod
