name: Tina
subject: Let's talk about October
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I want to take a second to explain.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181025-2_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, I know you've received a number of emails from me this month already -- but I want to take a second to explain why. October is the most crucial month of this campaign. We will spend more in October to run ads, print literature, hire staff, and reach voters than we will in many other months of this year combined. On top of that, in this month we are facing the largest attacks on our campaign yet -- super PAC ads against us, direct attacks from Trump in Minnesota, and attack ads from our opponent. We have to raise more money to compete this month than we do any other month of this campaign -- and any day we fall short of our goal we have to make cuts. That's something we've had to do already in October, and something we really can't afford to do again. **I 'm counting on you, friend, if you've been waiting to make your first donation now is the time when it is most critical. Polls are tightening and some are showing this race within 3 points -- so every dollar will matter.** **[Please make your first donation before midnight and ensure we have the resources to win this race on November 6th. Your contribution will be the difference between victory and defeat in this close race.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181025-2_em-full&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d294/c1f7015/6f376e1c/11408744/2698923931/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181025-2_em-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

October is the most crucial month of this campaign. We will spend more in October to run ads, print literature, hire staff, and reach voters than we will in many other months of this year combined. On top of that, in this month we are facing the largest attacks on our campaign yet -- super PAC ads against us, direct attacks from Trump in Minnesota, and attack ads from our opponent. We have to raise more money to compete this month than we do any other month of this campaign -- and any day we fall short of our goal we have to make cuts. That's something we've had to do already in October, and something we really can't afford to do again. name: J.D. Scholten
subject: $18,000 tab or gas station pizza?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
My most common meal these days is gas station pizza by the slice from whichever Casey’s convenience store I’m closest to. If I’m elected to Congress, this is the kind of story you will never read about me.
From _The Intercept:_
_Rep. Steve King, R-Iowa, who has long campaigned on his distaste for wasteful government spending, spent lavishly using his congressional expense account in Washington, D.C._
_King has billed taxpayers for more than $18,000 of food and beverages at the Capitol Hill Club, the private dining restaurant and bar reserved for GOP politicians and their guests, according to congressional disbursement records reviewed by The Intercept._
_...King has spent at least $118,000 on government-funded fact-finding trips abroad, including events with prominent anti-immigrant politicians throughout Europe._
_King has come under scrutiny for his cozy ties to far-right groups and neo-Nazis. In September, he tweeted a link to an account controlled by a prominent white nationalist radio host. Earlier this month, King raised eyebrows for his decision to endorse an obscure white nationalist running for Toronto mayor. He has a long history of racist and bigoted comments._
_...King has also come under scrutiny for his unusual campaign spending practices. According to the Des Moines Register, King paid his son and daughter-in-law $805,000 using his campaign account. Though the campaign money is not related to his government expense account, ethics watchdogs have questioned the arrangement, noting that King’s family appeared to be paid even when the campaign engaged in no significant activities during off years._
_King’s Democratic challenger, J.D. Scholten, has sharply criticized King as out-of-touch and more focused on building his brand among peculiar far-right groups than serving the needs of the district. King declined to hold a debate with Scholten, has not held any recent town halls, and has largely ignored his challenger’s campaign._
_“He’s been to Austria five out of the last six years on the taxpayers’ dime,” Scholten told an audience last week. “I want to know why. It’s not like we’re finding trade routes to Austria because of it.”_
[**_If you’re tired of an ineffective Congressman who spends more time embarrassing Iowa than working for us, CLICK HERE._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2839014/17990808/1944327696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk1ODI0ZS1iZWQ4LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2FS-DIlhU1uCGbCJyt9wAaWsm0XePupjJspDOmnsoU=) And if you ever see me at a Casey’s gas station, feel free to join me for a slice of pizza!
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2839015/17990809/1944327696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk1ODI0ZS1iZWQ4LWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2FS-DIlhU1uCGbCJyt9wAaWsm0XePupjJspDOmnsoU=)

name: betofortexas.com
subject: Quick update on early vote numbers in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

It’s day four of early voting here in Texas. We’re getting lots of
interesting data coming back to the campaign. Here’s a high-level
overview:

1. We broke the record for early voting turnout in a midterm. About as
many Texans are voting early as they do in presidential elections.
This is a really good sign for Beto.

2. Polls have Beto within the margin of error -- it’s going to be CLOSE.

3. We need to turn out more young voters. Young voters usually vote on
weekends when they’re off of school and work. We can pick up our pace
if we make a really big push this weekend.

This
election could be decided by a handful of votes. Given how close this is,
we need to increase our investment in “get out the vote” advertising to
Beto supporters -- especially young voters.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181025&t=1019&akid=21290%2E444211%2Eg6gOI1 ]Can you chip in right now to our
targeted advertising to get out Beto voters? Your donations right now
could mean the difference between victory and defeat.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: What we need, from coast to coast
body:
[1]Bernie Sanders

Sisters and Brothers -

We have the most important midterm election in the modern history of the
United States coming up in less than two weeks.

And what we need, from coast to coast, is to do everything we can between
now and then to elect strong progressive leaders — governors, senators,
members of Congress, state legislators — who will stand up to an
authoritarian president and right-wing Republicans who represent the
interests of the billionaire class in this country.

Because the only antidote I know for how you take on the wealthy, powerful
and greedy people who only care about their own interests is for people to
organize at the grassroots level to stand up and fight back.

Now I know that all of you are going to vote for progressives this
November. Maybe some of you have voted already. But I am here today asking
you to do something more than just vote.

I am here today to ask you to support one of the great progressive
candidates running for governor this year — Ben Jealous in Maryland. There
are very few candidates anywhere who have the progressive record that Ben
does. And with early voting starting TODAY in Maryland, he needs our help.

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6592?refcode=em181025-full&t=1025&akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP ]Can you split an important
$3
contribution between Ben Jealous’ campaign for governor of Maryland and my
work traveling the country rallying and organizing progressives ahead of
this election?

Four years ago, in 2014, we had the lowest voter turnout since World War
II.

Working people, people of color and young people didn’t come out to vote
in large numbers. And the result of an election where almost 2/3 of people
did not vote was that right-wing Republicans took control of the House,
the Senate, and many governorships across the country.

In 2018, we have to turn that upside-down. And I will tell you that if the
turnout at almost every stop on this tour is any indication, this year we
are going to have the highest voter turnout for a midterm election in
American history.

Look at some of these photos from our tour:

Yesterday in Boulder, Colorado

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6592?refcode=em181025-full&t=1026&akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP ][IMG]

Tuesday in Tempe, Arizona

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6592?refcode=em181025-full&t=1027&akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP ][IMG]

Monday in Milwaukee, Wisconsin

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6592?refcode=em181025-full&t=1028&akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP ][IMG]

Sunday in Ames, Iowa

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6592?refcode=em181025-full&t=1029&akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP ][IMG]

Saturday in Columbia, South Carolina

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6592?refcode=em181025-full&t=1030&akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP ][IMG]

What I am seeing at all of these stops is people coming out in large
numbers to say ENOUGH is ENOUGH! This country and our government belong to
all of us, not just the 1 percent.

But today we need to do something more — something important — to help
elect one of the great progressive candidates running for governor.
Because he cannot do it without us. So I have to ask:

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6592?refcode=em181025-full&t=1055&akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP ]Can you split an important
$3
contribution between Ben Jealous’ campaign for governor of Maryland and my
work traveling the country rallying and organizing progressives ahead of
this election?

Thank you very much for following along with this tour via emails like
this one and on social media. Today we are in Nevada. Tomorrow we head to
Southern California, and on Saturday we’ll end the tour in Berkeley,
California with what is shaping up to be a large and exciting event.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

[ https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6592?refcode=em181025-full&t=1056&akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP ]DONATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.berniesanders.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=274%2E150750%2Eeva0yP

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Meet my family!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
My heart beats for my family who raised me and the Georgia family I've made. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa771/34a064cc/20cdd8/70d4412/3807896838/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - As I travel across our state to meet with voters and talk about the issues, my heart beats for my family who raised me and the Georgia family I've made. My mom, dad, and five siblings shaped me into the person I am today, and the kind of Governor I will be for Georgia. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa771/34a064cc/20cdd8/70d4413/3807896838/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI1MjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10252018.2-full") Things weren't always easy for us growing up. We often struggled to make ends meet. Some days, we went without power and running water. But as my dad always says, "having nothing isn't an excuse for doing nothing." Service was - and still is - a way of life in our family. If we saw someone who was less fortunate, it was our job to help them, no matter what. That ethic led me to public service. Now, I am fighting to protect and uplift my Georgia family from the Governor's Mansion. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa771/34a064cc/20cdd8/70d4413/3807896838/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI1MjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10252018.2-full") I am so proud of what we have accomplished together these last few months. I am so full of love for both my families, who have stood with me through the long days (and nights) on the campaign trail. As Governor, I will fight for Georgia as hard as my parents fought for me. I will sweat the details. I will listen to all sides of an issue with an open heart and mind - because that's what true leadership demands. _But first, we need to win our election in just 12 days._ Tonight at midnight, we face our last public fundraising deadline of this campaign. This is our chance to prove to the critics who said a Democrat couldn't win in Georgia - and to the Republican donors who are working hard to make sure that's true - that we have the grassroots support we need to win. So I'm asking you: **[Will you make a $3 donation to my campaign for Governor before our midnight deadline?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa771/34a064cc/20cdd8/70d4413/3807896838/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI1MjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10252018.2-full")** I truly believe that Georgia is ready for a future where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive. And we can lead the rest of the Deep South forward with us. In 12 days, we will begin that new journey forward - but only if we all stand together right now. With sincere gratitude, Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa771/34a064cc/20cdd8/70d4413/3807896838/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI1MjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10252018.2-full")**

|
---

body:
We need you! Sign up today to work the polls in your community on Election Day, and make freedom work! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/make-freedom-work?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **Help Make Freedom Work!**
Sign-Up Now to Work the Polls on Election Day!
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3fc858fea5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Your community, state and country need you! [Sign up today](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07b76bd9ff&e=1acd9bb3d6), and let us know that you'd like to work the polls in your area on Election Day!

**Poll workers are the people who make freedom work! They're the ones who set up your polling location, check your ID, prepare your ballot and make sure that election laws are followed. **

Whether you're acting as an election inspector, judge, poll clerk, assistant poll clerk or sheriff, serving as a poll worker is a great way to make a difference in your community.

If you're interested in being a poll worker for the November 6 election, [fill out this form](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e3ac805aff&e=1acd9bb3d6) and we'll pass your name along to your local Republican Party leaders. There are limited spots available and not everyone will get to serve as a poll worker, so let us know your interest today!

---

subject: a personal request [TAKE ACTION]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | In a few moments, I'm going to ask you to match our $26 average online contribution. Peter, I wish I didn't have to send so many of these messages. But I don't have much choice. My opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci, is running disgusting personal attacks against me and my family. Dark money has been quick to follow -- a Super PAC has spent hundreds of thousands of dollars to amplify these attacks. [**I'm personally asking you to click the link below and make a contribution to my re-election campaign.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffeef/4462dc26/722ccd73/201f2ad2/1031847497/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI1cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ name: TK 2018
subject: Breaking news →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
BREAKING: Corey Stewart has officially made a TV ad buy in multiple media markets. Virginians can expect to see his negative smears against Tim Kaine during the final weeks of the campaign. ----------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37207b/960535658/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | [**BREAKING: Corey Stewart has officially made a TV ad buy in multiple media markets.**

Virginians can expect to see his negative smears against Tim Kaine during the final weeks of the campaign. We can't fight back against his attacks unless we reach our $80,000 goal. Will you fight back against Corey Stewart by making a donation right now?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37207a/960535658/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+BREAKING+Corey+Stewart+has+officially+ma&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")
---
| [**YES, I 'LL FIGHT BACK**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372078/960535658/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+YES+IrsquoLL+FIGHT+BACK&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")
---
Derek:

There are 11 days left until Election Day. Republicans are getting energized. Corey Stewart raised over a million dollars last quarter and as of yesterday, he's officially pouring it in to negative ads on TV. Now is the time that Democrats need to double down - triple down, even - on our own enthusiasm and commitment to restoring some decency to Washington, D.C.

**Here are the two biggest things you can do to make sure we take back the House and keep Stewart far, far away from the Senate:**
* **1.[Volunteer.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37207e/960535658/VEsC/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?event_type=1&is_virtual=false&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Volunteer&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND") We need to have conversations with voters in all 11 House districts about why, when, and where they will vote. You can be a part of that. [Sign up here](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37207c/960535658/VEsD/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/vavictory2018/?event_type=1&is_virtual=false&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Sign+up+here&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND"). (Not in VA? Go [here](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372071/960535658/VEsA/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND") to help out Democrats in your own state.)**

* **2.[Donate](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372076/960535658/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Donate&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND"). We are blanketing the Commonwealth with digital ads to counter Corey Stewart's negative attacks and turn out our key voters, and we can't keep them up unless we can fund them. [Chip in here](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372075/960535658/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Chip+in+here&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND").** We need to raise at least $80,000 by October 31st to fund these efforts, so helping us fill the $67,458 gap would make you a critical part of this operation.

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37204a/960535658/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+5&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")
---
| [**$50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372048/960535658/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+50&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37204d/960535658/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")
---
That's it. If you can do one or both of those things, you are doing your part to bring on the blue wave we so critically need. And like Tim said at his Get Out the Vote rally on the Eastern Shore last weekend, it's not just a wave of Democrats over Republicans. It's a wave of decency, of compassion, and of service over selfishness.

People all around the world are going to be watching the American public on November 6th to see what we have to say about who we are and the direction of our country. Let's show them a real wave. **Please: Volunteer and donate right now.** _(And of course - VOTE! If you 're not sure about when or where you'll be voting, visit [TimKaine.com/Vote](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37204c/960535658/VEsHBw/ "https://timkaine.com/vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+TimKainecomVote&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND") to get your details and make your plan.)_

We're almost there! Thanks for sticking with us.

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Emergency-October-Goal](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372042/960535658/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+httpssecuretimkainecomEmergencyOctoberGo&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")

_-Team Kaine_

[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372040/960535658/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")
---

|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372045/960535658/VEsHAA/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=15&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37205b/960535658/VEsHAw/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=16&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372059/960535658/VEsHAg/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=17&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e37205c/960535658/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=19+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10f7/3e0906/74e772ca/3e372053/960535658/VEsEBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=20+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND&source=20181025_4_FR_TEAM_breaking-LDND") Thanks for having Tim's back!

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: what Steve Bannon said about our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I hope you saw the quote from Steve Bannon, the right-wing former White House chief strategist. And then I hope you commit it to memory, because it should serve to motivate us in the final 12 days of
Friends, I hope you saw the quote below from Steve Bannon, the right-wing former White House chief strategist. **And then I hope you commit it to memory, because it should serve to motivate us in the final 12 days of this race.** This race is tight, Friends, I am the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and far-right figures like Bannon are determined to unseat me because it will help them hold control of the House. **[Please make a donation today to ensure that they do not succeed.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.25_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **We are on the front lines of the battle for the House majority, and we will not win this race or take back Congress without your support. Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Team O'Halleran Subject: "If she can beat O'Halleran, we'll hold the House" [](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.25_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **We can 't let Wendy Rogers win the House for the Republicans, team.** [**CHIP IN right now to defeat Rogers and Steve Bannon >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.25_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _If we lose this race, Democrats will almost certainly not gain control of the House, team._ That's what **Steve Bannon** , the right-wing former White House chief strategist, said when he visited our district last weekend and boosted Wendy Rogers. He didn't fly all the way here for fun, after all. He came to Arizona because Rogers and the GOP Super PACs boosting her are desperate to unseat Tom, _**and they are claiming late momentum in our race with only 12 days to go until Election Day.**_ Put simply: We cannot let that happen, team. But we have a lot to accomplish in the next 12 days to make sure it doesn't.
